text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you help keep things running smoothly! 🎉
Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Glad to have you join us! 🎉
Welcome to the community, @guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions! 🎉
Welcome to the community, @mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your guidance will be invaluable! 🎉
